title: NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners:
NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners!
